Label: Scorecard PullThrough
CCA Scorecard PullThrough
DefExpanded:
if(
	Sum(
    	Aggr([Current Production Check],[Loan Officer]))<0,
		Null(),
		Avg(
        	Aggr(
            	Count({<
                DateType*={'Application'}, 
                Rolling13MonthFlag*={Yes}, 
                [Active Loan Flag]*={No}, 
                [Pull Through Originated Flag]*={Yes}, 
                [Consolidated Channels]*={'Retail'}, 
                [Loan Officer Missing]*={0}
                >}[Loan Number])
		/
				Count({<
                DateType*={'Application'}, 
                Rolling13MonthFlag*={Yes}, 
                [Active Loan Flag]*={No}, 
                [Consolidated Channels]*={'Retail'}, 
                [Loan Officer Missing]*={0}, 
                *=
                >}
                Total<[Loan Officer]>[Loan Number])
	,[Loan Officer]
    )
	)
)
